scripts.build: echo 'Python service — no build step needed (interpreted)'
scripts.lint: cd ../../services/agents && python -m ruff check src || echo 'ruff not installed — run: pip install ruff'
scripts.typecheck: cd ../../services/agents && python -m mypy src || echo 'mypy not installed — run: pip install mypy'
scripts.test: cd ../../services/agents && python -m pytest src -q || echo 'pytest not installed — run: pip install pytest'
